info.name: RenderLab Studio API
info.description: Complete API collection for RenderLab Studio Backend

request.description: Requires auth middleware (not yet implemented). Will return 500 until middleware sets req.user.
Replace USER_OBJECT_ID and PLAN_OBJECT_ID with real MongoDB _id values.
Replace USER_OBJECT_ID with a real user _id.
Partial update supported. Replace :id with a real session _id.
Resets preferences. Replace :id with a real session _id.
Replace SESSION_OBJECT_ID and USER_OBJECT_ID with real _id values. role accepts: "user", "assistant", or "system". response is optional.
Replace USER_OBJECT_ID with a real user _id.
Replace USER_OBJECT_ID and ALBUM_OBJECT_ID with real _id values. album, storageId, prompt, metadata are optional.
Enhances a user's raw prompt into a more detailed, optimized version.
Sends a message within a session. Replace SESSION_OBJECT_ID with a real session _id. modelProp accepts "gemini" or "openai" (defaults to OpenAI if omitted).
Checks if a prompt would trigger a preference change — without actually sending a chat message. Replace SESSION_OBJECT_ID with a real session _id.
